description: WorldVistA upstream source config. Canonical location: scripts/fetch/worldvista-sources.config.json. Used by fetch-worldvista-sources.ps1 and pin-worldvista-sources.ps1.

sources.name: VistA-M
sources.purpose: Canonical M source baseline (OSEHRA VistA M components)

sources.name: VistA-VEHU-M
sources.purpose: Optional: VEHU (CPRS Demo) test database / seeded demo dataset

sources.name: VistA-VEHU-M-plan-vi
sources.purpose: Optional: upstream VEHU Plan VI UTF-8 source lane used by WorldVistA UTF-8 Docker builds
